# Transcrição: 08 Custom Audience Engaged with Ad Post

- **Fonte:** 08 Custom Audience Engaged with Ad Post
- **Duração:** 03:51
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 03:01]

Now, now let's have a look at retargeting people that engage with our ads, our posts, or even our videos. So you're going to go custom audience, create custom audience, and instead of customer file or website traffic, what we're doing is actually going engagement on Facebook. So click this one. And what you'll see is there's actually four options. We can create custom audiences of people that engage with our video post or ad. We can create custom audiences of people that engage with the lead ad. We can create a custom audience of people that engaged with a canvas ad. And we can also create a custom audience of people that engaged with the Facebook page. So let's start off with the video. So when you click on this, it's going to ask you to select how engaged they were with your video. Did they just watch five seconds and bounce? Did they watch 50% of it? Or did they watch the entire thing? So there's lots of different options in here. Typically what we recommend is if it's a very, very short video, such as 10 seconds, you'll want to do something like 25 to 50%. However, if it's a longer video, so it's over 10 seconds, you'd probably want to do around 10 seconds. So watch at least 10 seconds of a video. And again, you'll select how far back you want to go with this. The benefit here is it goes back a lot further than 180 days. And you're going to name this audience and save it. If we look at the lead ad version of this, this is very, very similar to the video one. However, the first step is going to be selecting that lead form. And then you can choose anyone who opened it, anyone who opened it but didn't submit it and opened it and submitted it. So actual leads that came in. So you can decide which type of custom audience you're building there. And you can go back as far as 90 days with this type of custom audience. Again, give it a name and then save it. With Canvas, this is very similar to the lead ad. You're just going to select the Canvas. People who opened it or people that clicked links on this Canvas can be created or added into a custom audience. And you can select to go back as far as 365 days. And lastly, if you want to retarget people that engaged with ad or post of yours, just select Facebook page and select the page that you want. And you'll have lots of different options here. So people that visited your page, people engaged with any post or ad, people who clicked a call to action button, people who sent a message to your page, and people who saved

## [03:01 - 03:51]

your page or any post. This one here is technically speaking a really, really warm audience, right? Someone that saves a link or saves a post is obviously really, really interested. This one here is if you're trying to retarget people that engaged with posts or ads. Now notice here, however, how you can't actually tell Facebook which particular posts or ads that you want to create a custom audience with. Meaning that if you select this option, you're actually going to be creating a custom audience of anyone that has engaged with any post or ad in the last 365 days. So it could have been the post that you want to create a custom audience with. It could also include other pieces of content that were released. So bear this in mind.
